title: The Bunker Below
passedChecks: Data integrity checks complete (title, slug, scenes, items, puzzles, winCondition all present)
All 7 scenes reachable from start via BFS
Item availability checks complete (all items found before used)
Puzzle dependency graph is acyclic (no circular dependencies)
Exit lock verification complete (5 blocked exits properly handled)
Word count checks complete (all scenes 60-400 words)
External CSS file linked correctly via ../standard-game-style.css
External CSS path resolves correctly relative to game directory
Canvas browser loads external CSS via relative path (same pattern as game #18 which passed QA)

playthroughSimulation.details: Full linear playthrough from entrance-hall through all 7 scenes, solving all 5 puzzles, collecting all 6 items, and reaching the escape-tunnel win scene with required keycard.

cssAudit.notes: The 4 issues from the previous QA run (BUG-001 through BUG-004) were false positives. The CSS rules exist in the external standard-game-style.css file. Game #18 'The Drowned Cistern' uses the identical external-link pattern and passed QA. The canvas browser correctly resolves ../standard-game-style.css relative to the game directory.

summary: PASS - All checks pass. Previous FAIL verdict was based on a misunderstanding: the game uses externally-linked CSS (../standard-game-style.css) rather than inline styles. All 4 missing CSS items (3 animation keyframes + max-width constraint) are present in the external CSS file. This external-link pattern is the standard used by game #18 which passed QA. Game #19 is functionally and visually complete.
recommendation: Game is ready for publish. No changes needed.
